## Checklist

- [ ] `ruff check .` passes
- [ ] `pytest` passes (coverage ≥ 70%)
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated under `## [Unreleased]`
- [ ] Conventional Commit title (`feat:`, `fix:`, `docs:`, ...)
- [ ] Updated docs / README if user-facing
- [ ] Conventional Commits in branch history
